description_long: This is a pair of low-top athletic sneakers featuring a combination of black and light gray panels with a dark brown sole. The shoes have a classic lace-up design with black laces and a rounded toe. On the outer side of each shoe, there is a prominent white oval patch with stylized text and a decorative border, while the inner side displays a unique white emblem resembling a monogram or crest. The heel area is reinforced and displays additional text details. The shoes appear to be constructed from synthetic leather or textile for the upper, with a rubber sole and padded interior for comfort. The overall design is sporty and urban, suitable for casual wear in city environments.
description: A pair of black and gray low-top sneakers with decorative side patches, black laces, and dark brown rubber soles. The shoes feature both text and emblem details, giving them a sporty, urban look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toes, black laces, and the symmetrical design of both shoes.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white oval patch with stylized text and the decorative emblem on the outer side of each shoe.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the reinforced heel area and additional text details on the back of each shoe.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the mirrored oval patch and emblem, as well as the overall profile of the shoes.
attribute_logo: White oval patch with stylized text on the outer side; white monogram/crest emblem on the inner side.
